_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE — NOT the real UK Sanctions List. Synthetic entries with fictional names so the tool runs and tests pass out of the box; every result is tagged dataset:'sample' and is NOT authoritative. Replace with the real data via: node scripts/build-data.mjs <UK-Sanctions-List.csv>. Source when loaded: official FCDO UK Sanctions List (Crown copyright, Open Government Licence v3.0).
